pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh checking INDEX_HTML and setup_task.sh mkdir commands.
Confirmed via export_result.sh SERVER_LOG path and setup_task.sh deletion of previous files.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh freeing port 8080 and task.json prompt instructions.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to serve an HTML test page at /home/ga/web_audit/index.html using a Python HTTP server on port 8080. The agent must log the server output to /home/ga/Documents/server.log, perform an initial evaluation recorded in /home/ga/Documents/initial_audit.txt, and perform a post-restart evaluation recorded in /home/ga/Documents/restart_audit.txt. These paths and the port are explicitly defined in the task's setup and evaluation scripts.
